I want to learn a new skill but I keep losing motivation after a week or two. Any advice?

That's such a common experience — you're definitely not alone in this! A few things that tend to make a real difference:

  • Shrink the habit — commit to just 10 minutes a day instead of an hour; consistency beats intensity early on
  • Attach it to something you already do — practise right after your morning coffee so it becomes automatic
  • Track streaks visually — a simple calendar with Xs is surprisingly powerful

What skill are you trying to learn?

I'm trying to learn Spanish. I do Duolingo but it starts feeling like a chore.

Duolingo is great for building a streak habit, but it can feel hollow once the novelty wears off because it lacks real communication. Try mixing in content that genuinely interests you — Spanish YouTube channels, a telenovela, or a podcast like Dreaming Spanish. Even 5 minutes of authentic input a day will make the language feel alive in a way that gamified exercises can't quite replicate.
